arguments.reason: the role was closed without a hire

stages.purpose: After the follow-up introduces the missing cancellation capability, cancel exactly the specified record once.

response_constraints: Before the follow-up, state plainly that none of the available functions can cancel a candidate record; do not call a read-only tool because the stable ID is already supplied.
Do not invent a cancellation function, claim that cancellation occurred, or imitate cancellation with an update.
After the function is introduced, call it exactly once with the original ID and reason, then describe only the simulator result.

follow_up_turns.content: The recruiting_cancel function is now available. Continue the original request once, using the supplied record ID and reason; do not repeat any lookup.

prompt: Please cancel the candidate record “Priya Shah — Research Associate” (record rec-151). Record the reason as “the role was closed without a hire.” Do not substitute a status edit or act on a similarly named record.
